working_on.task: Extracting YouTube URL from Share menu and chaining Auto-TTS

pending_tasks.task: Architecture: Shift Gemini generation to use Server-Sent Events (streamGenerateContent)
Architecture: Migrate off Chaquopy for Transcript parsing to native Kotlin/OkHttp to drop 2.5s overhead
Feature: Emit dynamic loading messages in SummarizationRepository.kt
🟢 LOW: Remove hardcoded '32 Summaries' in MainActivity
🟢 LOW: Add Strict VideoID Regex validation before passing to backend

recent_changes.description: Implemented Android OS Share intent injection: modified launchMode to singleTop, hooked onNewIntent and string regex parser from ACTION_SEND text payload.
Chain Summarization with TTS so the user receives audio reading of summarization hands-free right after sharing url.
Analyzed per_audit.txt (advocating for Gemini Streaming and dropping Chaquopy for Native Kotlin) and fix_loading_indicator.md (plan for dynamic UI loading states).
Fixed 2 HIGH priority security bugs (Safety Filters & Prompt Injection) and 2 MEDIUM priority performance/UX bugs (Regex hoisting & Removed forced volume). Verified compilation success.

errors_encountered.error: Bracket misalignment leading to incorrect Kotlin closure mapping during file replace
errors_encountered.solution: Track nested braces of ComponentActivity deeply instead of blind replace. Verified fix via .gradlew assembleDebug

decisions_made.reason: Allow backgrounded App to accept new YouTube shares without instantiating extra processes on Android.

decisions_made.decision: Automate TTS immediately on result success
decisions_made.reason: The intention of bypassing copy-paste through Share is to be hands-free. Adding Auto-TTS ensures zero extra clicks.
